allow: PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://cigarmapsclaude-production.up.railway.app/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"mobegibusiness@gmail.com","password":"W@ffle871"}'; $token = $login.token; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; $result = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://cigarmapsclaude-production.up.railway.app/api/admin/reset-database" -Method POST -Headers $headers -ContentType "application/json"; Write-Host $result.message)

PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://cigarmapsclaude-production.up.railway.app/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"mobegibusiness@gmail.com","password":"W@ffle871"}'; $token = $login.token; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; $stores = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://cigarmapsclaude-production.up.railway.app/api/admin/stores" -Headers $headers; $stores | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Store $\($_.id\): $\($_.name\) \(owner: $\($_.owner_email\)\)" })

PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://cigarmapsclaude-production.up.railway.app/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"mobegibusiness@gmail.com","password":"W@ffle871"}'; $token = $login.token; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; $result = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://cigarmapsclaude-production.up.railway.app/api/admin/stores/6" -Method DELETE -Headers $headers; Write-Host $result.success)

PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://cigarmapsclaude-production.up.railway.app/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"mobegibusiness@gmail.com","password":"W@ffle871"}'; $token = $login.token; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token"; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; $result = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://cigarmapsclaude-production.up.railway.app/api/admin/stores/6" -Method DELETE -Headers $headers; Write-Host "Deleted:" $result.success)

PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://cigarmapsclaude-production.up.railway.app/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"mobegibusiness@gmail.com","password":"W@ffle871"}'; $token = $login.token; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; $users = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://cigarmapsclaude-production.up.railway.app/api/admin/users" -Headers $headers; $users | Where-Object { $_.email -eq "mason.obegi@gmail.com" } | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "User $\($_.id\): $\($_.email\) \($\($_.account_type\)\)" })

PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://cigarmapsclaude-production.up.railway.app/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"mobegibusiness@gmail.com","password":"W@ffle871"}'; $token = $login.token; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token"; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; $result = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://cigarmapsclaude-production.up.railway.app/api/admin/users/12" -Method DELETE -Headers $headers; Write-Host "Deleted:" $result.success)

PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://cigarmapsclaude-production.up.railway.app/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"admin@cigarbuddy.com","password":"adminpass123"}'; $token = $login.token; $result = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://cigarmapsclaude-production.up.railway.app/api/admin/users/12" -Method DELETE -Headers @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; Write-Output "Deleted: $\($result.success\)")

PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://cigarmapsclaude-production.up.railway.app/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"admin@cigarbuddy.com","password":"admin123"}'; $token = $login.token; Write-Output "Token: $token"; $result = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://cigarmapsclaude-production.up.railway.app/api/admin/users/12" -Method DELETE -Headers @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; Write-Output "Deleted: $\($result.success\)")
